title: Very Bad Snowman
body:
Winter, holidays, fun. But one mob does not like this festive fuss, his name is bad snowman.
The mod adds one mob - a bad snowman, also armor and tools, they can be made from crystal snow ingot, which can be crafted using a snow crystal that drops from a bad snowman.

Bad snowman features:
- It spawns in *cold biomes*.
- Inflicts *blindness* on impact.
- *Faster and stronger* than normal mobs.
- **Doesn't like holidays :(**
